title: US Education Secretary McMahon urges Whitmer to join schools tax credit plan
summary_en: US Education Secretary Linda McMahon said Michigan should join 27 other states in a program that lets taxpayers pour money into scholarships for students to attend public or private schools.
author: Isabel Lohman
